# David Gitman

> Technology leader in ecommerce, cloud infrastructure, and AI automation.

David Gitman is a hands-on technology and ecommerce leader with 30+ years of experience building and scaling digital commerce platforms, cloud-native infrastructure, AI-driven automation, and operational systems across startups and growth-stage businesses.

## Key facts

- Name: David Gitman
- Title: Technology Leader | Ecommerce, Cloud Infrastructure & AI Automation
- Location: United States
- Email: david@because.ventures
- Phone: (917) 723-2895

## Expertise

Ecommerce and marketplace platforms; cloud infrastructure and DevOps; AI automation and workflow systems; headless commerce and scalable architectures; startup and high-growth technology environments.

Technologies: Shopify, Magento, AWS, GCP, React, Next.js, Node.js, Kubernetes, vector databases, RAG architectures, agent-based automation.

## Current focus

Headless commerce platforms, cloud-native infrastructure, affiliate commerce ecosystems, monetization systems, and AI-assisted development workflows using ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and GitHub Copilot.
